chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 5383 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 22451/25. 3. For hearing of main case. 09.02.2026 Mr. Adil Channa, Advocate holding brief for Mr. S. Naveed Hussain Wasti, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Faheem Raza, Advocate for Respondents. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, DAG. ---------- Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the department submits that no FIR has been issued as yet against the Petitioner and the department will act in accordance with the principles laid down by the Honorable Supreme Court vide Judgment dated 04.12.2204 in Civil Appeal No. 350/2016 (Directorate of Intelligence & Investigation FBR, Vs. Taj International (Pvt) Ltd etc.) and other connected matters. The Petition stands disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz
